The Fourth House.—In Chart No. 82, the fourth is Leo,
a fixed sign and it is occupied by the Moon, lord of the
third and hence blemished. It is aspected by Mercury, lord
of the fifth. In the Navamsa, the fourth house is Scorpio. It
is occupied by Mars, the lord, and aspected by Saturn, a
malefic.
Chart No. 82.—Born on 16-3-1908 at 10-56 a.m.
(I.S.T.) (Lat. 12° 2' N., Long. 75° 39' E.)
Balance of Ketu Dasa at birth : Year 0-0-13.
The Fourth Lord.—The Sun owning the fourth is in a
benefic sign in association with Saturn and aspected by
exalted Jupiter.
The Vidyakaraka-— Jupiter is exalted in the third;
While in the Navamsa he is in the third.

194 How to Judge a Horoscope
Conclusion.—It is the Vidyakaraka that is really
strong. The natives's general education in the sense of
school knowledge is poor. His knowledge of English is
almost nil. This is indicated by the Sun's (lord of the fourth)
conjunction with Saturn. But, however, his grasp of the
